titleStmt.title: SII 8.529: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 529. (A.R. No. 230 of 1903). ON THE BASE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE KODANDARAMESVARA TEMPLE AT TONDAMANAD NEAR KALAHASTI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī ... maturaikoṇṭa kopparakecariparmma kku yāṇṭu muppattuṉālāvatu tiruveṅkaṭakkoṭṭattu Āṟṟūrṉāṭṭu toṇṭaimāṉperāṟṟūr sabhaiye- mum nakarattomum paḷḷipaṭai vāgīśvarapaṇḍi tabha ṭārar śrīkotaṇṭarāmi- śvara mākiya Ādityeśvara karattu Āḷvārkkup puraṭṭātittiṅkaḷ tirukkeṭṭai mutal Eti reḻunāḷun tirunakṣattirammākiya tiruccataiyattaṉṟun tiruutsa vañceyvataṟkum bho jaṉattukkum paḷḷipaṭai vāgīśarapaṇḍitabha ṭārar toṇṭaimāṉperāṟṟūr sabhai yomum nakarattomum vaḻi cantrāditya vaṟ Idharmma ñceyvatāka Eṅkaḷvaḻi vaitta poṉ cuṭṭu veṭṭic cūṭukkaṭuttu tip- pokki Ūrkkaṟcemmai mutal nūṟṟaiṅ kaḻañcum vāgīśvarapaṇḍi taṉeṉṉum pūṇṭūmpiṉāl niṟaittaḷavu tūnel nālāyirak kāṭiyum Iṉnel nālāyirak kāṭikkum Āṇṭuvarai Aiṅkāṟ palicaiyāl vanta nel Āyirakkāṭi yinnel Āyirakkāṭikkun tiruviḻāveṭukkum Eḻunāḷum nicatippaṭi śrīma hāvra tika ḷuḷḷiṭṭa Āṟusama yattuttapasvi kaḷum Āka Irunūṟṟuvarum brāhma ṇar munnūṟṟuvarumaraka Aññūṟṟuvarum bhakta rāyiṉa palacamaiyaaññūṟṟuvarumāka Āyiravarkkum patteṭṭukkuttal meyyā larici nāṭuriyāka nicata marici muppatteḻu kāṭi Aintūmpāka Eḻunāḷum Ūṭṭic celavupeṟu marici Irunūṟṟaṟupattirukāṭi Aintūmpiṉāl Aintiraṇṭu vaṇṇa nellākki Aṟunūṟ ṟaimpattaṟu kāṭi Irutūm pirunāḻiyum tiruviḻāppo
tun tevarkkut tiruvamirtarici nicati ḻiyāka Eḻunāḷaikku nel Irukāṭi Aṟutūmpu nāḻiyun tīrttattu nāḷāl tirukkāḷattiāḷvārkkup peruntiruvamirtukkuk kaṟikkun tayirkkum neykkum Uḷḷiṭṭu nāṟkāṭi Oru tūm pirunāḻiyum cālaikkuk kaṟikku nicati Irukāṭiyāka neṟ patiṉaṟukāṭiyum morkku nel nicati patinaiṅ kāṭiyāka Eḻupatteḻukaāṭiyum Uppukku nicati nellu Orukāṭiyāka Eḻukāṭiyum puḷippaḻavaṭai 7- kku nellu Eḻukāṭiyum Ilaiiṭuvāṉukku nellu Eḻukāṭiyum nīraṭṭuvāṉukku nellup patiṉkāṭiyum kalamiṭuṅ kucavaṉukku nel muppatiṉ kāṭiyum cālaikkuk kaṟikku koḷḷu nicati Irukāṭikku nel mukkāṭiyāka Eḻunāḷaikkum nellu Irupattorukāṭiyum pūviṭu mālaikāraṉukku Eḻukāṭiyum viṟakiṭuvāṉukku nellu Eḻukāṭiyum Ippaṭi panmāheśva rakkaṇkāṇiyoṭu niṉṟivvaḻivu kaṇakkaṟuttu kkuṭukkakkaṭava Ivvūr madhyasta ṉukku nellu Irupatiṉkāṭiyum cālaikkaḷanta variciyiley Ivaṉukku nicata marici nāṉāḻiyum tiruccuṇṇattukku mañcaḷukku nellu Irukāṭi Oṉpatiṉṟūmpu muṉṉāḻiyum Āka nel Eṇṇūṟ ṟeḻupattumuk kāṭi nīkki niṉṟa nel nūṟ ṟirupatteḻu kāṭiyālp poṉ mukkaḻañce muṉṟumañcāṭiyuṅ kuṉṟiyum poṉ ṉūṟṟaiṅkaḻañciṉālum Āṇṭuvarai palicaiyāl vanta poṉ patiṉmuk kaḻañce Araikkālum Ākap poṉ patiṉaṟukaḻañce Āṟumañcāṭiyil nicatippaṭi Uṇṇum Āyiravarkkum Eḻunāḷaikku Uṇṇa ṇkāṭi Irutūmpu Āḻākku Intiraviḻāviṉukkumāka viḷakkiṉukkuney melppaṭi nāḷaikku nāṟkkāṭi Eḻutūmpa muṉṉāḻi muḻākke Āḻākkumāka ney patiṉmukkāṭikku ṟukaḻa ṭumāṇikaḷ patiṉma ḻañce kālum palakāyattukku Araik kaḻañcum veṟuṅkāy patiṉāyirattukku kaḻañcum veṟuvi
laip paṟṟu muṉṉūṟṟukku kkaḻañ caraiyuñ cuṇ rukaḻañcum Araṅkaḻivu coṉṟuṭaṉuṉṟicakkun taccaṉukku parṣai- yār kūttāṭiṉārkkum pāṭiṉārkkumāka pū(j)ai ṉaikku mukkaḻañ ṉpatiṉaṟu kaḻa ṉakavu mippoṉṉu vat celu ttuvomākavu mivvaḻi vipparicu vaḻuvāmey Ivvādityeśva rakarat tirukkum śrīma hāvra tikaḷum kāvirippākkattut tiruppaṉṟīśvara ttup piritiviṭaṅkak kaṇapperumakkaḷum panmā heśva rak kaṇkāṇiyum Immuṉṟu tiṟattārum niṉṟu Eṅkaḷait tāṅkal veṇṭina kocceytu Idharmma m celuttuvikkappeṟuvarākavum . mippaṭi Idharmmañcandrāditya vat vaittamaiyi lippaṭi vaḻuviṉa nāṉṟu Aṉṟāḷkoviṉukkunūṟṟukkaḻañcu poṉ taṇṭamumpaṭṭu Itdhanma mippaṭi vaḻuvāme celuttuvomākavu mittiruviḻāc cuṭṭip paṇiceymakkaḷukkuc coṟṟāl vanta Aḻivellā mivveḻāyiravarilumey celavupeṟuvatākavu mipparicoṭṭic celuttuvomākap paḷḷippaṭaiyuṭaiya vāgīśvara paṇṭitabha ṭārarkku Oṭṭukkuṭuttom toṇṭaimāṉperāṟṟūr sabhai yomum nakarattomum . Idharmma ttukku A hitam niṉaittār gaṅgai yiṭai kkumariiṭai Eḻunūṟṟuk kātattiluñ ceytār ceyta pāvattup paṭuvār . Idharmma ttai vaḻuvāme(c) celutti rakṣittār Aśvamedham ceyta palam peṟuvār .
Digital edition of SII 8.529 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
